task.title: Set up secrets management for cache-project
task.description: Complete the following task: Set up secrets management for cache-project. Follow best practices and ensure quality.

steps.thought: To accomplish this task, I'll first need to locate the relevant code.
I'll check the current status of the cache module.
Opening the configuration to check settings.
steps.observation:
version: '3.8'

services:
  cache:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@db:5432/cache-project
      - REDIS_URL=redis://cache:6379
    depends_on:
      - db
      - cache
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: cache-project
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  cache:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

volumes:
  postgres_data:

steps.observation:
# cache Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "cache-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
cache_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
